title: acrostichum lepidotum var. engelii
intro: Acrostichum lepidotum var. engelii, also known as the Engel's leather fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Marattiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Acrostichum lepidotum var. engelii include reducing inflammation, acting as an antiseptic, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
